headline: Socra - Socratic AI Tutor & Learning Platform
snippet: Used by 10,000+ learners at top universities Stop memorizing. Start understanding with your Socratic AI Tutor Socra exposes your blind spots through smart questions. Master any topic, prepare for exam
full_text: Used by 10,000+ learners at top universities Stop memorizing. Start understanding with your Socratic AI Tutor Socra exposes your blind spots through smart questions. Master any topic, prepare for exams, and build a library of notes—all in about 10 minutes. Start free — no credit card required Works on web, iOS, and Android Turns conversations into notes you can reuse Start free in your browser See a real example Best for students, self-learners, and professionals who want real understanding — not copied answers.
